name: briefcast
description: Personal podcast app. Fetches your daily briefing episodes. Each episode has audio, cover art, title, and a summary. Use when the user asks to play a podcast, briefing, or news episode.

latest.description: Returns the most recent episode. Response shape: { title, audioUrl, imageUrl, description, duration, pubDate }

search.description: Search episodes by topic or keyword. Response shape: [{ title, audioUrl, imageUrl, description, duration }]
